query_basis: Programs table rows with verified state program evidence.
Waiver-like program rows or fallback to verified program rows when the state stores waiver entry in the general spine.
Verified early-intervention or Part C agency rows.
Verified regional education or district pages with special-education routing.

samples.sample_name: Louisiana Department of Education Special Education

query_basis: Reviewed 2026-06-23 official LDOE School System Attributes and 2025-2026 School Directory workbook now provide district-grade local routing through the District Superintendents sheet and parish-coded school directory rows.

samples.evidence_snippet: The official LDOE School System Attributes page links the 2025-2026 School Directory workbook and other district-level data surfaces, replacing the earlier generic homepage fallback.
The official workbook includes a District Superintendents sheet with 70 district contact rows and an All Public Schools sheet with parish-coded district and school records.
The District Superintendents sheet lists Acadia Parish with superintendent Carol Dailey-Tall and a physical district address at 2402 North Parkerson Avenue, Crowley, LA 70526.

query_basis: Verified programs with VR or Pre-ETS context.
Reviewed first-party Disability Rights Louisiana evidence on disk preserves statewide disability-rights help routing, CAP/PABSS program signals, and direct statewide contact information.

samples.evidence_snippet: Disability Rights Louisiana. Client Assistance Program (CAP). Protection & Advocacy of Beneficiaries of Social Security. Information & Referral. GET HELP NOW. Phone: 1(800) 960-7705. Email: info@disabilityrightsla.org.

query_basis: Reviewed first-party LaPTIC evidence on disk explicitly states that Families Helping Families of Greater New Orleans serves as the Louisiana Parent Training and Information Center.

samples.sample_name: Louisiana Parent Training and Information Center
samples.evidence_snippet: Louisiana Parent Training & Information Center. Families Helping Families of Greater New Orleans serves as the Louisiana Parent Training and Information Center and has been providing services to Louisiana families of children with disabilities since 1991.

query_basis: Reviewed LouisianaLawHelp legal-help directory now provides a statewide parish-searchable legal-aid route.

samples.evidence_snippet: LouisianaLawHelp.org provides free legal help routing for Louisianans, preserves legal aid organization search, and supports Find a Lawyer by parish with named legal-aid programs and Louisiana parish coverage.

query_basis: Verified ABLE program pages from the program spine.

Reviewed 2026-06-23 official LDH Local Governing Entities page now preserves parish-grade local developmental-disability routing across all 64 parishes through 10 regional human-services districts and authorities.

samples.evidence_snippet: Acadiana Area Human Services District provides behavioral health and developmental disability services for the residents of Acadia, Evangeline, Iberia, Lafayette, St. Landry, St. Martin, and Vermilion parishes and lists a local waiver office phone.

Florida Parishes Human Services Authority provides developmental disability services in Livingston, St. Helena, St. Tammany, Tangipahoa, and Washington parishes and preserves OCDD contact phone numbers.

Jefferson Parish Human Services Authority provides developmental disability services in Jefferson Parish and lists the local physical address, executive-director phone, and OCDD division contact information.
